match_nodes.description: Israel's Policy on Artificial Intelligence Regulation and Ethics

data.official_name: Israel's Policy on Artificial Intelligence Regulation and Ethics ("Responsible Innovation")
data.notes: Published December 2023 jointly by the Ministry of Innovation, Science and Technology and the Ministry of Justice. Sectoral, risk-based, non-binding soft-law approach (vs. the EU AI Act's horizontal binding approach) -- a five-part regulator toolkit (risk assessment, sandboxes, soft instruments, targeted binding rules for high-risk uses, coordination center).
